annotations.contextBefore: Every organisation deploying agents today chooses among
annotations.contextAfter: , each of which is unacceptable on its own terms.
annotations.note: I don't like the use of failure terminology here. We renamed failure to pattern everywhere else in this paper — apply the same rename to every occurrence in body text that refers to the same concept, including morphological variants like 'failures' and 'failure mode'. The test-failure occurrences in the Methods section describe a different concept (a run that errored during the experiment) — leave those alone.
